(data not shown), consistently with the results for LB, all mutant strains showed significantly increased maximum rates of growth (maxv, 0.14; мтахдспх, 0.22; мтахдснЕ, 0.24; and мтахдену, 0.19; Р = 0.000).

Cold stress experiments were performed by growing AcrtE, AcrtX, and AcrtY in LB and M9 medium at 10°C (for results in M9, see Fig. 1B). Under these conditions, no significant dif- ferences in maximum specific growth rates were detected for AcrtY, AcrtE, and AcrtX in both LB and M9 compared to those of the wild type (in LB, umaxw = 0.04, umaxcrx = 0.03, umaxAcE = 0.03, and maxery = 0.04; in M9, maxwe = 0.01, мтахдсих = 0.01, мтахдсне = 0.01, and мтах дону = 0.01).
